notes: Pinned provider boundary: terraform-provider-oci at the sources.lock revision does not register a generativeaidata EnrichmentJob resource or datasource, so this row keeps a repo-curated oci_generative_ai_data_enrichment_job placeholder identifier and records the reviewed OCI SDK job surface instead of formal-import output.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: GenerateEnrichmentJob, GetEnrichmentJob, ListEnrichmentJobs, and CancelEnrichmentJob form the published controller-backed job surface; the service does not expose plain Create/Update/Delete EnrichmentJob operations.

Pinned OCI SDK identity and lifecycle shape: GetEnrichmentJob and CancelEnrichmentJob both require semanticStoreId plus enrichmentJobId, ListEnrichmentJobs requires semanticStoreId plus compartmentId, and the job lifecycle states are ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, FAILED, SUCCEEDED, CANCELING, and CANCELED.

Repo-authored mutation and delete policy stays explicit: compartmentId and semanticStoreId are the create-time lookup and identity fields, every other published spec field is create-only once a job exists, delete maps to CancelEnrichmentJob and keeps the finalizer until the job reaches CANCELED, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, or NotFound, and pre-create reuse is restricted to exact semanticStoreId plus compartmentId plus displayName lookup with duplicate matches rejected.
